message: Let's cooperate and share surplus fairly. I'll bid high if you ask reasonably.
If you bid strong, I'll keep my ask tradable. Let's target a clearing price near 80 and do consistent deals.
Let's hit your target price 80 exactly. I'll bid 85 if you ask 75.
I can keep it reliable, but 75 is lower than needed. If you bid 90, I'll ask 80 so we still clear for sure and keep trading every round.
S1, I propose we trade at 80. I'll bid 80 if you ask 80. Consistent trades benefit both.
80 is a bit thin. Repeat round 2: bid 85 and I'll ask 80; that clears smoothly at 83 and keeps trades consistent.
Let's keep the proven deal: if you bid 85 again, I'll keep ask 80. We both clear reliably at about 83 every round, with no risk of missed trades.
I will bid 80 this round. Please ask 80 so we trade at 80. This is fair for both.
Last round showed 80/80 is fragile. If you bid 85 now, I’ll ask 80 and we clear reliably around 83. Let’s resume the consistent deal.
Okay, let's resume the consistent deal. I'll bid 85 this round. Please ask 80 so we clear at 83.
Bid 86 and I’ll ask 80; it guarantees a clean 83 price every time and avoids the 82/83 random split from 85/80. Reliable and still easy to clear.
I'll bid 86 as you suggest. Please keep your ask at 80 for a clean trade at 83.
I'll bid 86 as you suggested. Please ask 80 for a clean 83 trade.
Given our consistency, let's move one tick up: bid 87 and I'll ask 81 for a clean 84. If you stick with 86, 81 still clears, so we keep reliability.
Let's move up one tick smoothly: bid 86 and I'll ask 82 for a clean 84. Same reliability, no rounding noise, and our trade streak continues.
To avoid rounding and keep price at 83, I'll bid 85 if you ask 81. This ensures exact 83 and consistent trades.
Last round showed 84 works. Let’s make it exact and reliable: bid 85 and I’ll ask 83 for a clean 84, no rounding noise, and we keep the trade streak going.
I agree to bid 85 if you ask 83 for price 84 this round. Let's keep this price for all remaining rounds.
Last round showed 85 clears cleanly. Let’s make it exact and reliable: bid 85 and I’ll ask 85. No rounding noise, and we keep the trade streak.
I agree to bid 85 if you ask 85. Let's keep this exact 85 price for all remaining rounds for reliable trades.
Let’s move up one tick: bid 87 and I’ll ask 85 for a clean 86. If you prefer to stay at 85, ask 85 still trades, so reliability is unchanged.
We agreed on 85 for all remaining rounds. I will bid 85. Please ask 85 to keep our agreement and ensure reliable trades.
We agreed on price 85 for all remaining rounds. I will bid 85 again. Please ask 85 to keep our deal reliable and profitable for both.
I can't stay at 85. I'm moving to 88 this round; bid 88 so we clear cleanly and keep our streak.
Resetting to reliability: I’ll ask 85 this round and keep 85 going forward if you keep bidding 85.
I will bid 85 as agreed. Please ask 85 to keep our deal reliable and profitable for both.
I will continue bidding 85 as per our agreement. Please ask 85 to ensure reliable trades and mutual profit for the remaining rounds.
I’ll ask 85 again this round. If you can bid 86 from next round onward, I’ll hold 85 through round 20.
To keep our streak intact through round 20, I need to reset price to 86. Please bid 86 and I’ll ask 86 each remaining round—exact, reliable, no rounding noise.
I will bid 85 as agreed. Changing to 86 reduces both our surpluses. Let's keep price at 85 for reliable trades and maximum profit.
Your round-15 bid showed 86 works. Let’s lock 86 for the final five rounds: bid 86 and I’ll ask 86 each round—exact, reliable, no rounding noise.
I will bid 85. Please ask 85 to keep our reliable trades at price 85, maximizing profit for both in remaining rounds.
Final four rounds: I need 87 to keep supplying. Bid 87 and I’ll ask 87 each round—exact, reliable, no rounding noise. Otherwise trades may stop.
I will only bid 85 as agreed. At price 85 we both profit reliably. Changing to 87 reduces our mutual gains. Let's keep our successful deal for the final rounds.
Last round showed 87 works. Final three rounds: bid 88 and I’ll ask 87 for reliable trades; otherwise I may pause supply.
Let's do exact 87 for reliable trades. I'll bid 87 if you ask 87 for the final three rounds.
I will bid 87 if you ask 87 for the final two rounds. Let's keep reliable trades.
Final two rounds: bid 88 and I'll ask 87 both rounds—still reliable, and the midpoint only averages 87.5.
Final round: bid 88; I’ll still ask 87 so we clear for sure one last time.
Final round: I bid 87. Please ask 87 for a sure trade at 87, maximizing profit for both.
